messages.content:
What was observed
- R1 Serial0/1/0 was admin up but oper "lower-layer-down"; R2 Serial0/1/0 was administratively down.

Diagnosis
- Root cause: remote administrative shutdown on R2 Serial0/1/0 caused the link to drop.

Changes made
- Re-enabled R2 Serial0/1/0 (no shutdown).

Verification
- Passed: R2 Serial0/1/0 now admin=up oper=up; R1 Serial0/1/0 admin=up oper=up; OSPF adjacency on the link is full (neighbor 10.0.0.2). 
- Remaining issues: none.
